top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Gilt yields inch higher as Andy Burnham unveils plans for government
top_signals.summary: Good morning from the City AM liveblog team. Stock markets wobbled on Monday as the US and Iran Iran ​agreed to halt recent hostilities in the Gulf and renew talks over their dispute over the Strait of Hormuz. Talks are expected to resume on Tuesday, officials said, but any halt on hostilities is regarded as [...]

top_signals.title: UK firms ‘bracing for change’ as Trump revives tariff threat over Big Tech tax
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump’s latest threat to impose 100 per cent tariffs on countries with digital services taxes has renewed concerns among British exporters, with business groups warning that a trade dispute over Big Tech could end up costing manufacturers billions. The US president said on Friday that any country imposing a digital services tax on American [...]

top_signals.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
top_signals.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Prosecutors seek life sentence over 2013 Ohsho president murder
top_signals.summary: The defendant, Yukio Tanaka, is accused of shooting Takayuki Ohigashi, the Ohsho president who was 72 at the time, to death in Kyoto.
